mapper.select:
select po.id, po.order_no as orderNo, po.plan_no as planNo, po.supplier_id as supplierId, po.warehouse_id as warehouseId, po.department_id as departmentId, po.order_date as orderDate, po.total_amount as totalAmount, po.order_status as orderStatus, po.remark, s.name as supplierName, c.customer_name as hospitalName, wh.name as warehouseName from purchase_order po left join fd_supplier s on po.supplier_id = s.id and (s.del_flag = 0 or s.del_flag is null) left join sb_customer c on po.tenant_id = c.customer_id left join fd_warehouse wh on po.warehouse_id = wh.id and (wh.del_flag = 0 or wh.del_flag is null) where po.del_flag = '0' and po.id in
#{id}

select id as entryId, parent_id as parentId, material_id as materialId, material_code as materialCode, material_name as materialName, material_spec as specification, material_unit as unit, order_qty as quantity, unit_price as unitPrice, total_amount as amount, remark from purchase_order_entry where del_flag = '0' and parent_id in
#{id}
